summary: Tested data consistency fixes in compliance system. All 11 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed Overview and What's Needed tabs now show IDENTICAL counts (11 approved, 10 ready for review, 2 still needed). Upload, View, Download buttons working. Three-dot menu visible on employee header. Minor browser crash during extended UI testing.
passed_tests: ✅ SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH: Overview and What's Needed tabs show IDENTICAL counts (11/23 approved, 10 ready, 2 needed)
✅ UPLOAD TEST: Upload document endpoint works correctly (POST /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence)
✅ VIEW TEST: View evidence endpoint returns file content (GET /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence/{file_id}/view)
✅ DOWNLOAD TEST: Download evidence endpoint works (GET /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence/{file_id}/download)
✅ REPLACE TEST: Replace file endpoint works (POST /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence/{file_id}/replace)
✅ REMOVE TEST: Soft-delete file endpoint works (POST /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence/{file_id}/remove)
✅ APPROVE TEST: Verify-all endpoint works for requirements with evidence
✅ STATE REFRESH: Compliance data updates immediately after upload
✅ NO DUPLICATES: No duplicate requirements in checklist
✅ UI: Upload Document dialog opens with requirement dropdown
✅ UI: View and Download buttons visible on requirements with evidence
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceOverview.js now correctly uses complianceRequirements prop from backend - FIXED
Both Overview and What's Needed tabs read from the same /compliance-requirements API endpoint - VERIFIED
Counts are now consistent: 11 approved, 10 ready for review, 2 still needed
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee OCS-0001 (Olakunle Alonge) with 47% compliance. Uploaded test documents during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data consistency issue FIXED. Overview and What's Needed tabs now show identical counts from the same backend endpoint (/api/employees/{id}/compliance-requirements). Employee OCS-0001 has 11 approved, 10 ready for review, 2 still needed. All CRUD operations (Upload, View, Download, Replace, Remove, Approve) tested and working via backend API tests.

verification_summary.data_consistency: FIXED - Both tabs use complianceRequirements from backend
verification_summary.overview_counts: 11/23 Checked & Approved, 10 Ready for Review, 2 Still Needed
verification_summary.whats_needed_counts: 11 approved, 10 ready for review, 2 still needed
